task: Format VP training case updated time cleanly on the case list

governance_bootstrap.summary: UI changes require real verification and completion evidence before completion reporting.
Customer-facing UI changes require completion evidence guard validation before final reporting.

changes: Added a case-card date formatter that renders ISO timestamps as YYYY.MM.DD HH:mm.
Removed seconds, microseconds, and timezone text from the visible case updated time.
Added truncation and spacing around the updated-time row so it stays tidy on narrow mobile cards.
Added a safe fallback label of 최근 수정 when the timestamp cannot be parsed.
